title: License and bundle Nunito (OFL) for hello-world-google
description: Google Sans is proprietary. The font slot is wired (ATSApplicationFontsPath = Fonts in Info.plist, CustomFontService(postScriptName:) ready in ServiceContainer), but no font file is bundled. Nunito is available from Google Fonts under the Open Font License and has similar rounded geometry to Google Sans. Task: download Nunito-Bold.ttf, place in Resources/Fonts/, update ServiceContainer to CustomFontService(postScriptName: 'Nunito-Bold', scale: .googleStyle), flip fontLicense gate to passed.
